title: Team and organization management
content: In CloudDash, an 'Organization' represents your company, and 'Workspaces' represent different environments (e.g., Production, Staging) or departments. Users are invited to the Organization and then granted access to specific Workspaces. This allows you to segregate data and access control strictly. You can rename your Organization from the Settings page. If you need to transfer Organization ownership to another user, the current owner must initiate the transfer via the Security tab, and the new owner must accept it via email. This section provides additional context to ensure comprehensive documentation. The CloudDash platform is built with robustness and scalability in mind. When encountering issues, always verify your configuration settings and ensure that your network allows communication with our endpoints. If you continue to experience difficulties, please consult the troubleshooting steps outlined previously. Our support team is available to assist you with any advanced configurations or unexpected behavior. Remember to keep your agent versions up to date to benefit from the latest features and security patches. Furthermore, monitoring your usage limits can prevent unexpected service interruptions. For detailed API specifications, refer to our developer portal. We are committed to providing reliable service and continuous improvements to our platform. Should you have any feedback or feature requests, do not hesitate to reach out. Thank you for choosing CloudDash as your monitoring solution. We hope this guide has been helpful in resolving your query.
